message.content:
Research the current state of these files and report their exact content/structure. I need to understand the current code before making edits:

1. /Users/xuelin/.openclaw/workspace-cinema/projects/tts-agent-harness/scripts/p2-synth.js — lines 20-45 (config and arg parsing)
2. /Users/xuelin/.openclaw/workspace-cinema/projects/tts-agent-harness/scripts/p4-validate.js — the extractDiffPairs function and the appendNormalizePatch call site (find both)
3. /Users/xuelin/.openclaw/workspace-cinema/projects/tts-agent-harness/.harness/config.json — full content
4. /Users/xuelin/.openclaw/workspace-cinema/projects/tts-agent-harness/run.sh — lines 52-77 (the should_run steps list and P1/P2 sections)
5. /Users/xuelin/.openclaw/workspace-cinema/projects/tts-agent-harness/test/run-unit.sh — last 30 lines (to see where to add new tests)

Report exact line numbers and content for each.

content.text: I'll research the current state of these files for you.

content.content:
1→#!/bin/bash
     2→# TTS Agent Harness — Multi-Agent Orchestration
     3→#
     4→# Usage:
     5→#   bash run.sh <script.json> <episode_id> [--from pN] [--output-dir <path>]
     6→#   bash run.sh example/demo-script.json demo
     7→#   bash run.sh script/brief01-script.json brief01 --output-dir /path/to/public/brief01/tts
     8→#
     9→# Resume from a step:
    10→#   bash run.sh <script.json> <episode_id> --from p3
    11→
    12→set -euo pipefail
    13→
    14→SCRIPT_PATH="${1:?Usage: run.sh <script.json> <episode_id> [--from pN] [--output-dir <path>]}"
    15→EPISODE="${2:?Usage: run.sh <script.json> <episode_id> [--from pN] [--output-dir <path>]}"
    16→
    17→FROM_STEP="p1"
    18→EXTERNAL_OUTPUT_DIR=""
    19→
    20→# 解析可选参数（位置不固定）
    21→shift 2
    22→while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do
    23→  case "$1" in
    24→    --from) FROM_STEP="${2:?--from requires a step name}"; shift 2 ;;
    25→    --output-dir) EXTERNAL_OUTPUT_DIR="${2:?--output-dir requires a path}"; shift 2 ;;
    26→    *) echo "Unknown option: $1"; exit 1 ;;
    27→  esac
    28→done
    29→
    30→# Paths — all relative to this repo root
    31→HARNESS_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "$0")" && pwd)"
    32→WORK_DIR="$HARNESS_DIR/.work/$EPISODE"
    33→AUDIO_DIR="$WORK_DIR/audio"
    34→TRANSCRIPT_DIR="$WORK_DIR/transcripts"
    35→VALIDATION_DIR="$WORK_DIR/validation"
    36→OUTPUT_DIR="$WORK_DIR/output"
    37→
    38→CHUNKS="$WORK_DIR/chunks.json"
    39→SUBTITLES="$WORK_DIR/subtitles.json"
    40→PREVIEW="$WORK_DIR/preview.html"
    41→TRACE="$WORK_DIR/trace.jsonl"
    42→
    43→VENV="$HARNESS_DIR/.venv/bin/activate"
    44→
    45→# 解析 script 路径：绝对路径直接用，相对路径基于 HARNESS_DIR
    46→if [[ "$SCRIPT_PATH" == /* ]]; then
    47→  RESOLVED_SCRIPT="$SCRIPT_PATH"
    48→else
    49→  RESOLVED_SCRIPT="$HARNESS_DIR/$SCRIPT_PATH"
    50→fi
    51→
    52→mkdir -p "$WORK_DIR" "$AUDIO_DIR" "$TRANSCRIPT_DIR" "$VALIDATION_DIR" "$OUTPUT_DIR"
    53→
    54→# Input hash — detect script changes, force P1 re-run
    55→SCRIPT_HASH=$(md5 -q "$RESOLVED_SCRIPT" 2>/dev/null || md5sum "$RESOLVED_SCRIPT" | cut -d' ' -f1)
    56→HASH_FILE="$WORK_DIR/.script_hash"
    57→if [[ -f "$HASH_FILE" ]] && [[ "$(cat "$HASH_FILE")" != "$SCRIPT_HASH" ]]; then
    58→  echo "  Script changed since last run, forcing re-run from P1"
    59→  FROM_STEP="p1"
    60→fi
    61→echo "$SCRIPT_HASH" > "$HASH_FILE"
    62→
    63→# Only clear trace on fresh run (--from p1)
    64→if [[ "$FROM_STEP" == "p1" ]]; then
    65→  > "$TRACE"
    66→fi
    67→
    68→should_run() {
    69→  local steps=("p1" "p2" "check2" "p3" "check3" "diff" "p4" "p5" "p6" "checkp6" "v2")
    70→  local found=false
    71→  for s in "${steps[@]}"; do
    72→    [[ "$s" == "$FROM_STEP" ]] && found=true
    73→    [[ "$found" == true && "$s" == "$1" ]] && return 0
    74→  done
    75→  return 1
    76→}
    77→
    78→echo "=================================================="
    79→echo " TTS Agent Harness: $EPISODE"
    80→echo " Script: $SCRIPT_PATH"
    81→echo " Working dir: $WORK_DIR"
    82→echo " Trace: $TRACE"
    83→echo "=================================================="
    84→
    85→# --- P1: Deterministic chunking ---
    86→if should_run p1; then
    87→  echo ""
    88→  echo "=== P1: Text Chunking ==="
    89→  node "$HARNESS_DIR/scripts/p1-chunk.js" \
    90→    --script "$RESOLVED_SCRIPT" \
    91→    --outdir "$WORK_DIR" \
    92→    --harness-dir "$HARNESS_DIR"
    93→fi
    94→
    95→# --- P2: Fish TTS Agent ---
    96→if should_run p2; then
    97→  echo ""
    98→  echo "=== P2: TTS Synthesis (Fish TTS Agent) ==="
    99→  node "$HARNESS_DIR/scripts/p2-synth.js" \
   100→    --chunks "$CHUNKS" \
   101→    --outdir "$AUDIO_DIR" \
   102→    --trace "$TRACE"
   103→fi
   104→
   105→# --- Post-P2 deterministic pre-check ---
   106→if should_run check2; then
   107→  echo ""
   108→  node "$HARNESS_DIR/scripts/precheck.js" \
   109→    --stage p2 \
   110→    --chunks "$CHUNKS" \
   111→    --audiodir "$AUDIO_DIR"
   112→fi
   113→
   114→# --- P3: WhisperX Agent (start server, batch transcribe, keep alive for P4) ---
   115→P3_PORT=5555
   116→P3_PID=""
   117→
   118→if should_run p3 || should_run p4; then
   119→  echo ""
   120→  echo "=== P3: Starting WhisperX Agent Server (port $P3_PORT) ==="
   121→  source "$HARNESS_DIR/scripts/start-p3-server.sh" "$P3_PORT" "$VENV" "$HARNESS_DIR/scripts/p3-transcribe.py" "$WORK_DIR"
   122→fi
   123→
   124→# --- P3: Batch transcribe via server ---
   125→if should_run p3; then
   126→  echo ""
   127→  echo "=== P3: Batch Transcription (via HTTP) ==="
   128→  python "$HARNESS_DIR/scripts/p3-transcribe.py" \
   129→    --chunks "$CHUNKS" \
   130→    --audiodir "$AUDIO_DIR" \
   131→    --outdir "$TRANSCRIPT_DIR" \
   132→    --server-url "http://127.0.0.1:$P3_PORT"
   133→fi
   134→
   135→# --- Post-P3 deterministic pre-check ---
   136→if should_run check3; then
   137→  echo ""
   138→  node "$HARNESS_DIR/scripts/precheck.js" \
   139→    --stage p3 \
   140→    --chunks "$CHUNKS" \
   141→    --transcripts "$TRANSCRIPT_DIR"
   142→fi
   143→
   144→# --- Text diff: deterministic comparison (pre-P4) ---
   145→if should_run diff; then
   146→  echo ""
   147→  echo "=== Text Diff: Deterministic Comparison ==="
   148→  node "$HARNESS_DIR/scripts/text-diff.js" \
   149→    --chunks "$CHUNKS" \
   150→    --transcripts "$TRANSCRIPT_DIR"
   151→fi
   152→
   153→# --- P4: Claude Agent (validate + auto-fix loop, uses P3 server for retranscribe) ---
   154→if should_run p4; then
   155→  echo ""
   156→  echo "=== P4: Validation + Auto-Fix (Claude Agent) ==="
   157→  node "$HARNESS_DIR/scripts/p4-validate.js" \
   158→    --chunks "$CHUNKS" \
   159→    --transcripts "$TRANSCRIPT_DIR" \
   160→    --audiodir "$AUDIO_DIR" \
   161→    --outdir "$VALIDATION_DIR" \
   162→    --p3-server "http://127.0.0.1:$P3_PORT" \
   163→    --trace "$TRACE" \
   164→    --harness-dir "$HARNESS_DIR"
   165→  echo ""
   166→  echo ">>> V1 Review: Check validation results above <<<"
   167→  echo "    All chunks passed or only low severity — press Enter to continue"
   168→  echo "    Need manual intervention — press Ctrl+C to exit"
   169→  read -r
   170→fi
   171→
   172→# --- Shutdown P3 server ---
   173→source "$HARNESS_DIR/scripts/stop-p3-server.sh" "$WORK_DIR" "$P3_PORT"
   174→
   175→# --- P5: Deterministic subtitle generation ---
   176→if should_run p5; then
   177→  echo ""
   178→  echo "=== P5: Subtitle Generation ==="
   179→  node "$HARNESS_DIR/scripts/p5-subtitles.js" \
   180→    --chunks "$CHUNKS" \
   181→    --transcripts "$TRANSCRIPT_DIR" \
   182→    --outdir "$WORK_DIR"
   183→fi
   184→
   185→# --- P6: Deterministic audio concat + subtitle offset fix ---
   186→if should_run p6; then
   187→  echo ""
   188→  echo "=== P6: Audio Concatenation ==="
   189→  node "$HARNESS_DIR/scripts/p6-concat.js" \
   190→    --chunks "$CHUNKS" \
   191→    --audiodir "$AUDIO_DIR" \
   192→    --subtitles "$SUBTITLES" \
   193→    --outdir "$OUTPUT_DIR"
   194→fi
   195→
   196→# --- Post-P6 end-to-end validation ---
   197→if should_run checkp6; then
   198→  echo ""
   199→  echo "=== Post-P6: End-to-End Validation ==="
   200→  node "$HARNESS_DIR/scripts/postcheck-p6.js" \
   201→    --subtitles "$SUBTITLES" \
   202→    --durations "$OUTPUT_DIR/durations.json"
   203→fi
   204→
   205→# --- V2: Review preview ---
   206→if should_run v2; then
   207→  echo ""
   208→  echo "=== V2: Review Preview ==="
   209→  node "$HARNESS_DIR/scripts/v2-preview.js" \
   210→    --audiodir "$OUTPUT_DIR" \
   211→    --subtitles "$SUBTITLES" \
   212→    --output "$PREVIEW"
   213→
   214→  # Trace summary
   215→  if [[ -s "$TRACE" ]]; then
   216→    echo ""
   217→    echo "=== Pipeline Trace Summary ==="
   218→    node -e "require('$HARNESS_DIR/scripts/trace.js').summary('$TRACE')"
   219→  fi
   220→
   221→  echo ""
   222→  echo ">>> V2 Review: Open preview in browser <<<"
   223→  echo "    open $PREVIEW"
   224→  open "$PREVIEW" 2>/dev/null || true
   225→fi
   226→
   227→# --- Copy to external output dir ---
   228→if [[ -n "$EXTERNAL_OUTPUT_DIR" ]]; then
   229→  echo ""
   230→  echo "=== Copying output to $EXTERNAL_OUTPUT_DIR ==="
   231→  mkdir -p "$EXTERNAL_OUTPUT_DIR"
   232→  cp "$OUTPUT_DIR"/*.wav "$EXTERNAL_OUTPUT_DIR/" 2>/dev/null || true
   233→  cp "$OUTPUT_DIR/durations.json" "$EXTERNAL_OUTPUT_DIR/" 2>/dev/null || true
   234→  cp "$SUBTITLES" "$EXTERNAL_OUTPUT_DIR/subtitles.json" 2>/dev/null || true
   235→  echo "  Done: $(ls "$EXTERNAL_OUTPUT_DIR"/*.wav 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ') WAV files + subtitles.json + durations.json"
   236→fi
   237→
   238→echo ""
   239→echo "=================================================="
   240→echo " Done!"
   241→echo " Output:"
   242→echo "   Audio:     $OUTPUT_DIR/<shot>.wav"
   243→echo "   Durations: $OUTPUT_DIR/durations.json"
   244→echo "   Subtitles: $SUBTITLES"
   245→echo "   Preview:   $PREVIEW"
   246→echo "   Trace:     $TRACE"
   247→if [[ -n "$EXTERNAL_OUTPUT_DIR" ]]; then
   248→echo "   Copied to: $EXTERNAL_OUTPUT_DIR/"
   249→fi
   250→echo "=================================================="
   251→

1→#!/bin/bash
     2→# 离线单元测试 — 不调任何 API，秒完
     3→set -euo pipefail
     4→
     5→DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "$0")" && pwd)"
     6→HARNESS="$(cd "$DIR/.." && pwd)"
     7→PASS=0
     8→FAIL=0
     9→
    10→run_test() {
    11→  local name="$1"
    12→  local cmd="$2"
    13→  printf "  %-50s" "$name"
    14→  if eval "$cmd" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    15→    echo "PASS"
    16→    PASS=$((PASS + 1))
    17→  else
    18→    echo "FAIL"
    19→    FAIL=$((FAIL + 1))
    20→  fi
    21→}
    22→
    23→echo "=== Unit Tests ==="
    24→echo ""
    25→
    26→# ------------------------------------------------
    27→# P1 Tests
    28→# ------------------------------------------------
    29→echo "--- P1: Chunking ---"
    30→
    31→WORK=$(mktemp -d)
    32→node "$HARNESS/scripts/p1-chunk.js" --script "$HARNESS/example/demo-script.json" --outdir "$WORK" >/dev/null 2>&1
    33→
    34→run_test "P1: produces 4 chunks" \
    35→  "node -e \"const c=require('$WORK/chunks.json'); process.exit(c.length===4?0:1)\""
    36→
    37→run_test "P1: all chunks have text + text_normalized" \
    38→  "node -e \"const c=require('$WORK/chunks.json'); process.exit(c.every(x=>x.text&&x.text_normalized)?0:1)\""
    39→
    40→run_test "P1: reversibility (concat === original)" \
    41→  "node -e \"
    42→    const fs=require('fs');
    43→    const script=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('$HARNESS/example/demo-script.json','utf-8'));
    44→    const chunks=require('$WORK/chunks.json');
    45→    const original=script.segments.map(s=>s.text).join('');
    46→    const rebuilt=chunks.map(c=>c.text).join('');
    47→    process.exit(original===rebuilt?0:1);
    48→  \""
    49→
    50→run_test "P1: normalize adds brand breaks" \
    51→  "node -e \"const c=require('$WORK/chunks.json'); process.exit(c.some(x=>x.text_normalized.includes('. '))?0:1)\""
    52→
    53→run_test "P1: no chunk exceeds 300 chars" \
    54→  "node -e \"const c=require('$WORK/chunks.json'); process.exit(c.every(x=>x.char_count<=300)?0:1)\""
    55→
    56→run_test "P1: date format preserved (no 到 in YYYY-MM-DD)" \
    57→  "node -e \"
    58→    const c=require('$WORK/chunks.json');
    59→    process.exit(c.every(x=>!x.text_normalized.includes('到03到'))?0:1);
    60→  \""
    61→
    62→# P1: min-chunk merge respects char limit
    63→# Create a script with a 190-char segment followed by a 1-sentence segment
    64→MERGE_WORK=$(mktemp -d)
    65→cat > "$MERGE_WORK/script.json" << 'EOF'
    66→{"segments":[{"id":1,"text":"这是一段非常非常非常非常非常非常非常非常非常非常非常非常非常非常非常非常非常非常非常非常非常非常非常非常长的文本，超过一百五十个字的段落。这里还有更多内容来确保这个片段已经接近两百字的上限了。这段话的存在就是为了测试合并保护机制是否正常工作。第三句话。第四句话。第五句话。最后一句。"}]}
    67→EOF
    68→node "$HARNESS/scripts/p1-chunk.js" --script "$MERGE_WORK/script.json" --outdir "$MERGE_WORK" >/dev/null 2>&1
    69→
    70→run_test "P1: merged chunk ≤ 300 chars" \
    71→  "node -e \"const c=require('$MERGE_WORK/chunks.json'); process.exit(c.every(x=>x.char_count<=300)?0:1)\""
    72→
    73→rm -rf "$WORK" "$MERGE_WORK"
    74→
    75→# ------------------------------------------------
    76→# P5 Tests
    77→# ------------------------------------------------
    78→echo ""
    79→echo "--- P5: Subtitles ---"
    80→
    81→WORK=$(mktemp -d)
    82→mkdir -p "$WORK/transcripts"
    83→
    84→cat > "$WORK/chunks.json" << 'CHUNKS_EOF'
    85→[
    86→  {"id":"shot01_chunk01","shot_id":"shot01","text":"3月7号Karpathy发了630行代码，autoResearch，23天60000 stars。Fortune杂志叫它The Karpathy Loop。","text_normalized":"...","status":"validated","char_count":78,"duration_s":8.5},
    87→  {"id":"shot02_chunk01","shot_id":"shot02","text":"yoyo-evolve，一个Rust写的agent，每8小时自动改一轮自己的源码。它的操作对象是自身代码，评估函数是cargo test加mutation testing。约束系统是一个IDENTITY.md，8条不可变规则。Skill Creator 2.0也一样——操作对象是skill描述文本，四要素齐全，连评估函数都用了验证集六四分割。","text_normalized":"...","status":"validated","char_count":172,"duration_s":20.5}
    88→]
    89→CHUNKS_EOF
    90→
    91→cp "$DIR/fixtures/mock-transcript-shot01.json" "$WORK/transcripts/shot01_chunk01.json"
    92→cp "$DIR/fixtures/mock-transcript-shot02.json" "$WORK/transcripts/shot02_chunk01.json"
    93→
    94→node "$HARNESS/scripts/p5-subtitles.js" --chunks "$WORK/chunks.json" --transcripts "$WORK/transcripts" --outdir "$WORK" >/dev/null 2>&1
    95→
    96→run_test "P5: produces subtitles.json" \
    97→  "test -f '$WORK/subtitles.json'"
    98→
    99→run_test "P5: has both shots" \
   100→  "node -e \"const s=require('$WORK/subtitles.json'); process.exit(s.shot01&&s.shot02?0:1)\""
   101→
   102→run_test "P5: shot01 has subtitle lines" \
   103→  "node -e \"const s=require('$WORK/subtitles.json'); process.exit(s.shot01.chunks.length>0?0:1)\""
   104→
   105→run_test "P5: no NaN or Infinity in timestamps" \
   106→  "node -e \"
   107→    const s=require('$WORK/subtitles.json');
   108→    for(const shot of Object.values(s)){
   109→      for(const ch of shot.chunks){
   110→        for(const sub of ch.subtitles){
   111→          if(!isFinite(sub.start)||!isFinite(sub.end)) process.exit(1);
   112→        }
   113→      }
   114→    }
   115→    process.exit(0);
   116→  \""
   117→
   118→run_test "P5: timestamps are non-negative" \
   119→  "node -e \"
   120→    const s=require('$WORK/subtitles.json');
   121→    for(const shot of Object.values(s)){
   122→      for(const ch of shot.chunks){
   123→        for(const sub of ch.subtitles){
   124→          if(sub.start<0||sub.end<0) process.exit(1);
   125→        }
   126→      }
   127→    }
   128→    process.exit(0);
   129→  \""
   130→
   131→run_test "P5: timestamps are monotonically non-decreasing" \
   132→  "node -e \"
   133→    const s=require('$WORK/subtitles.json');
   134→    for(const shot of Object.values(s)){
   135→      for(const ch of shot.chunks){
   136→        let prev=-1;
   137→        for(const sub of ch.subtitles){
   138→          if(sub.start<prev-0.001) process.exit(1);
   139→          prev=sub.end;
   140→        }
   141→      }
   142→    }
   143→    process.exit(0);
   144→  \""
   145→
   146→run_test "P5: no empty text in subtitles" \
   147→  "node -e \"
   148→    const s=require('$WORK/subtitles.json');
   149→    for(const shot of Object.values(s)){
   150→      for(const ch of shot.chunks){
   151→        for(const sub of ch.subtitles){
   152→          if(!sub.text||sub.text.trim().length===0) process.exit(1);
   153→        }
   154→      }
   155→    }
   156→    process.exit(0);
   157→  \""
   158→
   159→run_test "P5: subtitle lines ≤ 25 chars" \
   160→  "node -e \"
   161→    const s=require('$WORK/subtitles.json');
   162→    for(const shot of Object.values(s)){
   163→      for(const ch of shot.chunks){
   164→        for(const sub of ch.subtitles){
   165→          if(sub.text.length>25) process.exit(1);
   166→        }
   167→      }
   168→    }
   169→    process.exit(0);
   170→  \""
   171→
   172→run_test "P5: no English words split mid-word" \
   173→  "node -e \"
   174→    const s=require('$WORK/subtitles.json');
   175→    for(const shot of Object.values(s)){
   176→      const subs = shot.chunks.flatMap(ch=>ch.subtitles);
   177→      for(let i=1;i<subs.length;i++){
   178→        const prev=subs[i-1].text;
   179→        const cur=subs[i].text;
   180→        // Mid-word split: prev ends letter (no trailing space/punct), cur starts letter
   181→        if(/[a-zA-Z]$/.test(prev) && !/[\s，。、；,]$/.test(prev) && /^[a-zA-Z]/.test(cur)) process.exit(1);
   182→      }
   183→    }
   184→    process.exit(0);
   185→  \""
   186→
   187→# P5: word 少于 line 数时不丢字幕
   188→FEW_WORDS=$(mktemp -d)
   189→mkdir -p "$FEW_WORDS/transcripts"
   190→cat > "$FEW_WORDS/chunks.json" << 'EOF'
   191→[{"id":"c1","shot_id":"s1","text":"第一句话。第二句话。第三句话。第四句话。第五句话。","text_normalized":"...","status":"validated","char_count":25,"duration_s":5.0}]
   192→EOF
   193→# Only 3 words for 5 subtitle lines
   194→cat > "$FEW_WORDS/transcripts/c1.json" << 'EOF'
   195→{"chunk_id":"c1","shot_id":"s1","original_text":"...","original_normalized":"...","segments":[{"text":"第一句话第二句话第三句话第四句话第五句话","start":0.0,"end":5.0,"words":[{"word":"第","start":0.0,"end":1.0},{"word":"一","start":1.0,"end":2.5},{"word":"句","start":2.5,"end":5.0}]}],"full_transcribed_text":"第一句话第二句话第三句话第四句话第五句话"}
   196→EOF
   197→node "$HARNESS/scripts/p5-subtitles.js" --chunks "$FEW_WORDS/chunks.json" --transcripts "$FEW_WORDS/transcripts" --outdir "$FEW_WORDS" >/dev/null 2>&1
   198→
   199→run_test "P5: few words → still produces subtitles" \
   200→  "node -e \"
   201→    const s=require('$FEW_WORDS/subtitles.json');
   202→    const subs=s.s1.chunks[0].subtitles;
   203→    // splitSubtitleLines merges short sentences → 2 lines; 3 words split across 2 lines
   204→    process.exit(subs.length>=2?0:1);
   205→  \""
   206→
   207→run_test "P5: few words → no NaN/Infinity" \
   208→  "node -e \"
   209→    const s=require('$FEW_WORDS/subtitles.json');
   210→    const subs=s.s1.chunks[0].subtitles;

   413→  fs.writeFileSync('$MERGE_WORK/chunks.json',JSON.stringify(c,null,2));

   611→{"segments":[{"id":1,"text":"空补丁测试。第二句。"}]}

   616→
   617→rm -rf "$EMPTY_PATCH_WORK"
